opinion.h4: WOMACK v. OHIO. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 12, Misc. Decided October 12, 1959.
opinion.p: Mark McElroy, Attorney General of Ohio, and William M. Vance, Assistant Attorney General, for respondent.
The motion for leave to proceed in forma pauperis and the petition for writ of certiorari are granted and the judgment is reversed. Burns v. Ohio, 360 U.S. 252.
MR. JUSTICE STEWART took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
